whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.body: Yiwu Lafatik Trade Co., Ltd is <highlight>the first trade company</highlight> from Timor-Leste established in China. We specialize in connecting businesses in Timor-Leste with manufacturers and suppliers in China, providing comprehensive logistics and trade solutions. The company actively planning import business, helping various local products, specialty goods and agricultural commodities sourced from Timor-Leste to enter and circulate in the Chinese market, realizing two-way bilateral trade circulation between the two countries.

office.title: Our Office
office.body: We operate from strategic locations in Yiwu, China, with 2 warehouses in Yiwu and Guangzhou. Our presence in China allows us to provide unparalleled service, understanding Chinese market deeply while facilitating smooth trade operations between the two nations. Our warehouse team brings over 10 years of packing experience, plans distribution from cargo lists to maximize container use, and weighs each item and the full container to meet shipping limits.

hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Yiwu Lafatik Trade Co., Ltd is pioneering trade relations between Timor-Leste and China, committed to facilitating seamless international commerce and logistics solutions.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
paragraphs: Established as the first trade company from Timor-Leste in China, Yiwu Lafatik Trade Co., Ltd represents a historic milestone in bilateral trade relations between our nations. We are headquartered in Yiwu, the world's largest wholesale market, with operations extending to Guangzhou and also Timor-Leste.

Our company was founded on the principle that strong trade partnerships can transform economies and create opportunities for businesses of all sizes. We specialize in connecting small and medium enterprises (UMKM) in Timor-Leste with manufacturers and suppliers in China, while also serving larger corporations and government agencies.

With deep understanding of both Chinese and Timorese markets, we navigate cultural nuances, language barriers, and regulatory requirements to ensure smooth transactions and timely deliveries. Our team brings together expertise in international trade, logistics, customs clearance, and supply chain management.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: To become the leading international trade and logistics gateway connecting Timor-Leste with ASEAN and the world, promoting fair global trade, diversification of the Timor-Leste economy

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: Build a strong trade bridge between China and Timor-Leste, supporting economic growth through professional logistics, reliable import-export services, especially for the SME's

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.body: Operating with honesty, accountability, and ethical practices
